prompt: I want to run DSSAT for maize in a small area of Honduras. Bounding box is [-87.5, 14.2, -87.2, 14.5], year 2021. I already have the weather cube at D:/cubes/climate_hnd_2021.nc and the soil cube at D:/cubes/soil_hnd.nc. The output should go to D:/results/yield_hnd.nc. Use cultivar IB1072 with planting date May 15 2021.

assertions.text: uses_with_cubes_mode: Config YAML contains mode: with_cubes
shows_validate_command: Response includes ag-cube-cm validate command
shows_run_command: Response includes ag-cube-cm run command
confirms_before_writing: Skill shows a plan and asks for confirmation before generating files
